content:
## 待测试功能

### 涉及文件（8 个）
1. src/main/java/com/ghost616/platform/entity/ModelConfig.java
2. src/main/java/com/ghost616/platform/dto/model/ModelConfigDTO.java
3. src/main/java/com/ghost616/platform/dto/model/ModelCreateRequest.java
4. src/main/java/com/ghost616/platform/dto/model/ModelUpdateRequest.java
5. src/main/java/com/ghost616/platform/service/model/ModelConfigService.java
6. src/main/java/com/ghost616/platform/service/model/ModelConfigServiceImpl.java
7. src/main/java/com/ghost616/platform/controller/ModelConfigController.java
8. src/test/java/com/ghost616/platform/service/agent/DefaultChatDataProviderTest.java

### 变更内容
将上述 8 个文件中 `import com.ghost616.platform.enums.PlatformType` 改为 `import com.ghost616.agentinteg.model.PlatformType`

### 需要的测试
- 编译测试：验证项目编译无误，新的 import 路径正确
